response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in experience
Lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems (most AI exposure is recent)
Limited indication of direct enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or consulting engagements
